name: SOC | New Local User Account Created
notes: MITRE T1136.001 | Detects EventID 4720 (Windows user created) or Linux useradd. Threat actors create backdoor accounts for persistence post-compromise.

tests.name: EventID equals 4720
tests.text: when the event(s) were detected by a QRadar Custom Rule // EventID = 4720

responses.description: New local user account created - possible persistence attempt
